## Checklist

- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] I did **not** add any network request, telemetry, or message-persisting I/O (see [PRIVACY.md](../docs/PRIVACY.md))
- [ ] The core analytics stay pure (no clock/fs/network under `src/core/analytics`)
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed
